sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77269" key="panarxai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-αρχαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <sense id="n77269.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γράμματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:150" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.150</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
